_comment: DO NOT remove or modify feature definitions. Only update 'passed' status after verification.

features.description: Parse PDM export and categorize files by type and dependencies
Upload standalone parts as master Part Studios with Y-up orientation
Upload Pack & Go ZIPs via translations API with Y-up orientation
Delete duplicate instances from imported assembly
Create new instances from master parts with correct transforms
Group all instances to lock relative positions
Fasten first instance to assembly origin to prevent movement
features.notes: Creates BTMMate with FASTENED type to origin

features.description: Delete duplicate Part Studio elements after relinking
Run complete relink workflow on test assembly
features.notes: Tested with 10365-01 (2 parts) and 30172 (5 parts, 16 instances)

features.description: Release all elements in a document after migration
features.notes: Exists but not tested in new workflow

features.description: Bulk upload from Excel with properties and release
features.notes: For non-CAD files (PDFs, docs) only. Uses blob upload, not translations API. Not part of CAD migration workflow.

features.description: Test workflow with larger assembly (40037 - 26 parts)
Run migration on actual production data
